description: AI-powered customer retention analysis including churn prediction, personalized outreach planning, and policy optimization

agents.name: Churn Predictor
agents.description: Analyzes behavioral signals, calculates churn probability, identifies risk factors, and estimates retention windows

agents.name: Outreach Agent
agents.description: Plans optimal outreach strategies including channel selection, messaging themes, timing, and personalization

agents.name: Policy Optimizer
agents.description: Identifies coverage adjustments, bundling opportunities, estimated savings, and value improvements
